# catalystcenter_floor_image (Resource)

This resource uploads a floor plan image (PNG, JPEG, PDF) to an existing floor in Catalyst Center. The image is used for map visualization and RF planning. Every time this resource is created or re-created, the image is uploaded. When destroyed, no action is taken (Catalyst Center does not support deleting floor images via API).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "catalystcenter_floor_image" "example" {
  floor_id    = "34af13e4-da94-4c5f-8da2-aa51a0f0655e"
  source_path = "testdata/floor_plans/test_floor_plan.png"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `floor_id` (String) The ID of the floor to upload the image to
- `source_path` (String) Local file path to the floor plan image. Supported formats: PNG, JPEG, PDF.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The id of the object
